title: T-014 — Schema-driven Zod runtime from Reference.DeptColumns
prompt:
# T-014 — Schema-driven Zod runtime from DeptColumns

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §4.2 (ADR-028)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Generate per-dept Zod schemas at runtime from Reference.DeptColumns metadata, used by Server Actions for input validation and by client forms via zodResolver.

## Implementation contract
New packages/schema-runtime/src/build-dept-zod.ts exposing buildDeptZod(tenantId, dept) returning ZodObject. Each column maps: text→z.string(), number→z.coerce.number(), date→z.coerce.date(), dropdown→z.enum() built from Reference[dropdown_source]. required_for_done=true → required, else .optional(). 5-min cache keyed by (tenant_id, dept, schema_version). Tests verify required handling, dropdown enum sourcing, and cache invalidation.

## Files
- packages/schema-runtime/src/build-dept-zod.ts [create]
- packages/schema-runtime/src/cache.ts [create]
- packages/schema-runtime/__tests__/build-dept-zod.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given Reference.DeptColumns row product_name(text, required_for_done=true), when buildDeptZod('Core') runs, then resulting schema rejects undefined product_name with required message
2. Given dropdown column pack_size with dropdown_source='PackSizes' rows ['250g','500g'], when schema validates pack_size='1kg', then validation fails with enum error
3. Given DeptColumns row schema_version increments, when next buildDeptZod call runs, then a fresh schema is returned (cache busted)

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 tests for required, enum, cache invalidation
- Run 'pnpm --filter schema-runtime test'

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass tenant scoping in DeptColumns query
- Do not cache cross-tenant entries together
- Do not generate types at build time (must be runtime per ADR-028)

pipeline_inputs.description: buildDeptZod runtime generator that produces per-dept Zod schemas from Reference.DeptColumns metadata.
pipeline_inputs.details: Drizzle reads DeptColumns + dropdown source rows; reducer maps data_type to Zod primitive, applies required_for_done. 5-min in-memory cache keyed by (tenant, dept, schema_version).
out_of_scope: Do not introduce Drizzle-Zod codegen at build time
Do not couple to specific Apex tenant

Given dropdown col pack_size with source PackSizes rows ['250g','500g'], when schema validates pack_size='1kg', then validation fails with enum error
Given DeptColumns row schema_version increments, when next buildDeptZod call runs, then a fresh schema is returned
